content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad market rallying with Nifty +0.89%, Auto +1.44%, Realty +1.97%, IT +0.99%. VIX cooling -4.16% to 17.30 supports risk-on. Book is +1.13% on the day with 8 positions running — focus is on managing existing winners (trail SLs) rather than fresh entries given heavy deployment and 4 pending orders already in the book.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "PNBHOUSING +7.9% — strong move post-Q4 results (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA 0.93%). SL already at 1048 (above entry 984) locks +6.5%. Current SL is fine; CMP 1062 still has room to original target 1110 (R1 1001/R2 1013 already cleared). Holding SL at 1048 — no change needed actually. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "GOLDBEES -2.7%, CMP 121.81 vs SL 119. Defensive geopolitical hedge thesis intact (Iran tensions, Fed uncertainty, central bank buying). SL 119 is appropriate (just below recent base). Do not trail tighter — would whip out on normal gold volatility. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1448.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NESTLEIND +3.7%. Q4 PAT +27% YoY, fresh 52w high. SL already at 1448 (well above entry 1412.94, locks +2.5%). Current SL/target are appropriate; stock at 1467 still has room to 1500 target. No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "NTPC -0.2%, CMP 403.45 vs SL 401. Faded today after morning strength (sold off 13:30 candle). Tight SL just below entry already protects. Power thesis still intact, Q4 results May 15 catalyst pending. SL cannot be loosened, already tight — HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1750.00,
      "new_target": 1810.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing SL 1750/target 1810 unchanged — switching to HOLD. SL above entry 1734 locks +0.9%. Organon acquisition catalyst supportive but adds debt risk; defensive pharma sector holds up. Hold position."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "new_target": 330.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "POWERGRID +0.5%, CMP 322.20 near 52w high 324.95. Current SL is at entry 320.50 (breakeven). Tightening SL slightly down to 318 would actually LOOSEN — rejected by guardrail logic. Keep SL at 320.50. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Override prior MODIFY. SL 320.50 already at breakeven, tight enough. Near 52w high but board meeting Apr 30 could be catalyst. HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 480.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "COALINDIA +2.4%, CMP 481.15. Q4 PAT +75.6% YoY, strong dividend, 52w high broken. SL already at 480 (locks +2.3%). No change to SL/target — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 75,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HINDZINC entry 612, CMP 615.65, SL 615 — current price is essentially AT the stop loss. Bearish Engulfing + Bearish Marubozu on 2026-04-23 daily candle is a structural negative pattern. Today's intraday faded from 621 high to 614. Dividend record date tomorrow (Rs 11) but ex-div price drop will likely trigger SL anyway. Better to exit cleanly here at small profit/breakeven than get stopped out post-dividend with uncertainty. Cut and redeploy."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1048.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1048 locking +6.5%. Strong post-results momentum, target 1110 still in play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL appropriately wide given gold volatility."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1448.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +2.5% gain; FMCG momentum strong, let it run to 1500 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 401.00,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL 401 already protects. Q4 results catalyst May 15."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1750.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 1750 locks +0.9%. Organon catalyst plus defensive pharma."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 320.50,
      "reasoning": "Breakeven SL, near 52w high. Board meeting Apr 30."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 480.00,
      "reasoning": "SL above entry locks +2.3%. Strong Q4, dividend declared."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Price hovering at SL with bearish daily patterns. Exit cleanly rather than risk dividend ex-date drop triggering SL."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK, GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER all sitting as OPEN limit orders — letting them work. Not adding more new entries today. NIFTYBEES near consolidation, no compelling entry. ONGC/RELIANCE/BHARTIARTL/MARUTI/ITC/GRSE/TECHM all interesting but book already 50% deployed across 8 positions; sector concentration risk in energy (NTPC, COALINDIA, POWERGRID) means I should NOT add another energy/PSU name. Discipline.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is +1.13% today with 8 positions; deployment 50% + 4 pending orders if filled push toward 70%+. Per the deployment hysteresis rule, default disposition for new entries is NO_ACTION. Performance context shows 14% win rate over 5 days with 0.4x profit factor — this demands tighter risk control, not more trades. Exiting HINDZINC because price is at SL and bearish patterns are present. All other positions have SLs locking gains or with tight risk. Focus next 1h 19min: monitor existing pending limits, no new initiations."
}
